ddt:Target.Name: BCB_5AGen1_v6.5
ddt:Target.Description:
Request for reading service 19 in specification B
By Christophe CANDAS Sce : 65676
18/02/2013: Mise en conformité de la base regles ODX
15/02/2013: extension de la visibilité de la base BCB pour le projet X61 ph2
12/03/2010: updating BasicPartList reference
Adding screens for DID: $3101, $3102, $3103, $3104, $3105, $3106, $3107, $3108, $3109, $310A, $310B, $310C, $310E, $310D, $312D, $312E, $312F, $3132, $3133, $3134, $3135, $3136, $3137, $3138, $313A
20/05/2010 Updating BasicPartList reference( Change from 1 to 2) by Adebayo RHODES Updating Interlocks by Adebayo Rhodes
18/06/2010 Updating Screens: Roulage/Charge lente/Charge rapide
18/06/2010 Evol V6.0 -> V6.1, by Gilles VERNIER
Adding screens for: Supplier session and visualization of requests FFF0, FFF1, FFF5.
28/06/2010 Removing 1 DTC (0xD00264) Adding 4 new DTC (0x013096, 0x013113, 0x010425, 0x010712) by Adebayo Rhodes
05/08/2010 Adding screens for: Supplier session and visualization of requests FFF2, FFF3, FFF4, FFF6 and FF01
27/08/2010 Adding screens for Supplier session and visualization of requests FFF8
27/09/2010 Updating of the DID 3120 and DIDFF40 by Adebayo RHODES
13/12/2010: Updating of the devices by Adebayo RHODES
07/03/2011 Updating of the devices by Axel BOILE new DTC 0x0104 $64 delete DTC 0x0104 $13

Data.Name: Quick drop counter
Data.Comment: Counter of quick drop process, sent by EVC

Data.Name: SlowChargingCurrent
Data.Comment: EVC slow charge current set point

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DIDFFF0.Derating_Mode_Active
Data.Comment: Alarm that indicates the BCB entered the Derating Mode (any reason)

Data.Name: DIDFFF0.Input_Overcurrent_Alarm
Data.Comment: Max input current has been hard-limited

Data.Name: DIDFFF0.Output_Overcurrent_Alarm
Data.Comment: Max output current has been hard-limited

Data.Name: DIDFFF0.Primary_Hardware_Alarm
Data.Comment: A hardware failure @ primary side stopped the DCDC

Data.Name: DIDFFF0.Secondary_Hardware_Alarm
Data.Comment: A hardware failure @ secondary side stopped the DCDC

Data.Name: DIDFFF0.Output_Short_Circuit_Alarm
Data.Comment: A short-circuit @ charger output has been detected

Data.Name: DIDFFF0.SCI_Error
Data.Comment: Some message from Control Board not received

Data.Name: DIDFFF0.Interlock_sec_connector_sts
Data.Comment: Status interlock connector secondary (0: open, 1: closed)

Data.Name: DIDFFF0.Final_Ambient_temperature
Data.Comment: Result of the ambient temperature processing

Data.Name: DIDFFF0.Status_FCHG_N_Relay
Data.Comment: Monitor the status of the Fast charge relay positive

Data.Name: DIDFFF0.Status_FCHG_P_Relay
Data.Comment: Monitor the status of the Fast charge relay negative

Data.Name: DIDFFF0.Input_current
Data.Comment: Measure of the input AC current

Data.Name: DIDFFF1.Input_Current_Limit
Data.Comment: Input current limit value (foreseen values are 10,15,16 and 20A)

Data.Name: DIDFFF1.FCHG_Vdrop_Relay_P
Data.Comment: Voltage drop fast charge relay P status (0: open, 1: closed)

Data.Name: DIDFFF1.FCHG_Vdrop_Relay_N
Data.Comment: Voltage drop fast charge relay N status (0: open, 1: closed)

Data.Name: DIDFFF1.PFC_Alarm_Reset
Data.Comment: Recover the PFC operation after an alarm condition

Data.Name: DIDFFF1.Set_Output_Max_Current
Data.Comment: To program the max output current

Data.Name: PaddingDatas
Data.Comment: Spaces in Ascii, added to complete the frame request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 0 to be coded in ASCII
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 1 to be coded in ASCII
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 10 to be coded in ASCII
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 11 to be coded in ASCII
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 12 to be coded in ASCII
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 13 to be coded in ASCII
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 14 to be coded in ASCII
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 15 to be coded in ASCII
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 2 to be coded in ASCII
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 3 to be coded in ASCII
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 4 to be coded in ASCII
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 5 to be coded in ASCII
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 6 to be coded in ASCII
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 7 to be coded in ASCII
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 8 to be coded in ASCII
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 9 to be coded in ASCII
Data.Comment: To be readen by request $2184, tracability

Data.Name: DID3137.QuickChargeStartRequest
Data.Comment: EVC fast charge protocol requests : Start charge Stop session Temporary Stop

Data.Name: DID3137.QuickChargeSessionStopRequest
Data.Comment: Fast charger stop session request to EVC

Item.Text: Quick Charge Session Stop Not Requested

Data.Name: DID3137.QuickChargeTempStopRequest
Data.Comment: EVC fast charge protocol requests : Start charge Stop session Temporary Stop

Item.Text: Quick Charge Session Stop Not Requested

Data.Name: DID3119.QuickChargeStopRequest
Data.Comment: Fast charger stop request to EVC

Data.Name: DID3119.QuickChargeEmergencyStop
Data.Comment: Fast charger emergency stop request to EVC

Item.Text: Quick Charge Emergency Stop Not Requested

Data.Name: DID3119.KLineState
Data.Comment: Presence of signal on K line

Item.Text: Charger has not received Security Limits
Charger has not received Stop Request
Charger has not received Start Request
Charger has received Temp Stop Request
Charger has not received Temp Stop Request
Nissan Quick Charge and Diag State

Data.Name: DIDFFF5.MainsFrequency
Data.Comment: Frequency measured at input mains in Hz

Data.Name: DIDFFF4.HV Battery_monitoring
Data.Comment: Voltage Battery measured by the mcu_sec

Data.Name: DIDFFF4.Output_Current_DCDC
Data.Comment: Output Current DCDC measured by the mcu_sec

Data.Name: DIDFFF4.Output_Voltage_DCDC
Data.Comment: Output Voltage DCDC measured by the mcu_sec

Data.Name: DIDFFF4.Feedback_current_consign
Data.Comment: Voltage measured by the mcu_sec after low pass filter of signal PWM2

Data.Name: DIDFFF4.Feedback_voltage_consign
Data.Comment: Voltage measured by the mcu_sec after low pass filter of signal PWM1_Vout

Data.Name: DIDFFF2.14VBatteryVoltage
Data.Comment: AD Battery voltage without conversion to Volts

Data.Name: DIDFFF2.14VBatteryVoltageSwitched
Data.Comment: AD 14V Switched Battery voltage without conversion to Volts

Data.Name: DIDFFF2.NTC1_PCB
Data.Comment: AD Input for NTC1 without conversion to °C

Data.Name: DIDFFF2.NTC2_PCB
Data.Comment: AD Input for NTC2 without conversion to °C

Data.Name: DIDFFF2.NTC3_PCB
Data.Comment: AD Input for NTC3 without conversion to °C

Data.Name: DIDFFF2.PILOT_J1772
Data.Comment: Sense the voltage of Control Pilot signal for diagnosis purposes

Data.Name: DIDFFF2.NTC_Coolplate
Data.Comment: AD input for NTC_Coolplate without conversion to °C

Data.Name: DIDFFF2.VCC
Data.Comment: AD Input for Vcc without conversion to Volts

Data.Name: DIDFFF2.VCC_SW
Data.Comment: AD Input for Vcc without conversion to Volts

Data.Name: DIDFFF2.Ea_NCH_DET_LOGIC
Data.Comment: AD Detection Logic Input without conversion to Volts

Data.Name: DIDFFF2.Ea_RSA_NCH_DET_LOGIC
Data.Comment: AD Detection Logic Input without conversion to Volts

Data.Name: DIDFFF2.EDIAG_LED_Ilimit
Data.Comment: Diagnosis line for Current Limit LED output

Request.Name: DataRead.Batt_voltage_mes
Request.Comment: Request $22 - + Bat supply measured by BCB

Request.Name: DataRead.SlowChargingMaxPower
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Max power under Slow Charge

Request.Name: DataRead.InterlockBatt
Request.Comment: Request $22 - Interlock plug service from LBC

Request.Name: DataRead.BCBState
Request.Comment: Request $22 - EVC consign for BCB status

Request.Name: DataRead.SlowChargingCurrent
Request.Comment: Request $22 - EVC slow charge current set point

Request.Name: DataRead.QuickChargeCurrentLimit
Request.Comment: Request $22 - EVC fast charge current limit

Request.Name: DataRead.QuickChargeVoltageLimit
Request.Comment: Request $22 - EVC fast charge voltage limit

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

DataItem.Name: Siemens serial number Byte 0 to be coded in ASCII
Siemens serial number Byte 1 to be coded in ASCII
Siemens serial number Byte 10 to be coded in ASCII
Siemens serial number Byte 11 to be coded in ASCII
Siemens serial number Byte 12 to be coded in ASCII
Siemens serial number Byte 13 to be coded in ASCII
Siemens serial number Byte 14 to be coded in ASCII
Siemens serial number Byte 15 to be coded in ASCII
Siemens serial number Byte 2 to be coded in ASCII
Siemens serial number Byte 3 to be coded in ASCII
Siemens serial number Byte 4 to be coded in ASCII
Siemens serial number Byte 5 to be coded in ASCII
Siemens serial number Byte 6 to be coded in ASCII
Siemens serial number Byte 7 to be coded in ASCII
Siemens serial number Byte 8 to be coded in ASCII
Siemens serial number Byte 9 to be coded in ASCII

Request.Name: StartSupplierSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Test.Description: Improper signal shape. Duty cycle between 3% and 7%
Control Pilot detected, but detection logic not detected
Control Pilot detected but detection logic not detected
No answer is received from EVC
Power supplies out of range (5V or 12V or 14V Sw)

Device.Name: Output PFC
Device.Mnemonic: Internal : (SCI signal: TBD) 1 An overvoltage in Mains could produce an overvoltage in Output PFC 2. The failure could be due to internal o external factors

Test.Description: Over Voltage (>440V) and relay is not closed

Device.Name: PWM HV Current Consign
Device.Mnemonic: The PowerPlant Secondary Micro generates a PWM signal to indicate the Maximum Input Current

Test.Description: SC in relay coil or OT
SC in relay coil or OT
SC in relay coil or OT

Device.Name: PPPrimary_Power_Module_Temp
Device.Mnemonic: Power Module Temperature sensor in power module of power plant malfunction

Device.Name: Mains input (Line1and Line2)
Device.Mnemonic:
Mains Input : (SCI signal: TBD)
1 An overvoltage in Mains could produce an overvoltage in Output PFC 2. The failure could be due to internal o external factors

Test.Description: Mains power requested but no answer from EVSE

Device.Name: Current_Limit_Switch
Device.Mnemonic: Logical Input : (ED_Current_Linit) Button pressed for more than 2 minutes

Test.Description: Possible SC in Current limit Switch
power supplies out of range (5V or 12V)
Not to be used in after sales
Power supplies out of range (5V or 12V)
Internal secondary connector unplugged (SC to GND or open load)
S2 switch enabled but no level change in analog feedback

Device.Name: CAN Bus off
Device.Mnemonic: CAN ETS communication "Transmission Not Possible" not needed for after sale tools

Device.Name: CAN node EVC missing
Device.Mnemonic: CAN ETS communication "Transmission Not Possible" not needed for after sale tools
